message:
Command `# Update the resolved.json in pnr_run_v3 to use the new PDK hash and IP versions
RUN_V3="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v3"

# Copy the fresh resolved.json from the dry-run (which has correct PDK + IP versions)
cp /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_dryrun/resolved.json "$RUN_V3/resolved.json"

echo "Using pnr_dryrun resolved.json for pnr_run_v3"
python3 -c "
import json
with open('$RUN_V3/resolved.json') as f:
    d = json.load(f)
print('PDK_ROOT:', d.get('PDK_ROOT','?')[:80])
vf = d.get('VERILOG_FILES', [])
print('VF count:', len(vf))
print('NC_XIP:', [p for p in vf if 'NC_XIP' in p][:1])
" 2>/dev/null` executed with exit code 0.

extras.command:
# Update the resolved.json in pnr_run_v3 to use the new PDK hash and IP versions
RUN_V3="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v3"

# Copy the fresh resolved.json from the dry-run (which has correct PDK + IP versions)
cp /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_dryrun/resolved.json "$RUN_V3/resolved.json"

echo "Using pnr_dryrun resolved.json for pnr_run_v3"
python3 -c "
import json
with open('$RUN_V3/resolved.json') as f:
    d = json.load(f)
print('PDK_ROOT:', d.get('PDK_ROOT','?')[:80])
vf = d.get('VERILOG_FILES', [])
print('VF count:', len(vf))
print('NC_XIP:', [p for p in vf if 'NC_XIP' in p][:1])
" 2>/dev/null
